THEHEROEXPANSION-TRY_AGAIN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put an Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Enchant[/gold] it with [purple]Sharp {Sharp:diff()}[/purple]
THEHEROEXPANSION-TRY_AGAIN.selectionScre: Select an Attack to Enchant with Sharp {Sharp:diff()}.
THEHEROEXPANSION-TRY_AGAIN.title: Try Again
THEHEROEXPANSION-BEAST_WITHIN.descriptio: Whenever you deal single target damage to a [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] enemy, deal that much damage to ALL other enemies
THEHEROEXPANSION-BEAST_WITHIN.title: Beast Within
THEHEROEXPANSION-BUTTERFLY_KNIFE.title: Butterfly Knife
THEHEROEXPANSION-BEHIND_YOU.title: Behind You
THEHEROEXPANSION-CEASE_TO_EXIST.descript:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
For the next {CeaseToExistPower:diff()} turns, You cannot use Attacks.
THEHEROEXPANSION-CEASE_TO_EXIST.title: Cease To Exist
THEHEROEXPANSION-WORK.title: WORK!
THEHEROEXPANSION-SERVE.description: At the start of your turn, add 1 [gold]Minion Duty[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-SERVE.title: SERVE!!
THEHEROEXPANSION-THE_WORLD.description: Take an extra turn after this one
THEHEROEXPANSION-THE_WORLD.title: The World
THEHEROEXPANSION-MINION_LABOR.title: Minion Labor
THEHEROEXPANSION-MINION_DUTY.title: Minion Duty
THEHEROEXPANSION-SWIPE.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals {OstyDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()} for each enemy hit.
THEHEROEXPANSION-SWIPE.title: Swipe
THEHEROEXPANSION-SODA_POP.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add a [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Osty[/gold] heals {Heal:diff()} HP.
THEHEROEXPANSION-SODA_POP.title: Soda Pop
THEHEROEXPANSION-PERISH_SONG.title: Perish Song
THEHEROEXPANSION-SPLIT_SHARD.title: Split Shard
THEHEROEXPANSION-BIT_FLIP.description:
[gold]Evoke[/gold] all of your Orbs.
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Lightning[/gold] for each [gold]Frost[/gold].
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Frost[/gold] for each [gold]Lightning[/gold]
THEHEROEXPANSION-BIT_FLIP.title: Bit Flip
THEHEROEXPANSION-KILL_DRIVE.title: Kill Drive
THEHEROEXPANSION-MAGIC_PEN.description: Enchant an Attack or Skill in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [purple]Dreamy[/purple]
THEHEROEXPANSION-MAGIC_PEN.selectionScre: Select an Attack or Skill to Enchant with Dreamy.
THEHEROEXPANSION-MAGIC_PEN.title: Magic Pen
THEHEROEXPANSION-REINFORCED_BODY.title: Reinforced Body
THEHEROEXPANSION-EXHUME.description: Put a card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-EXHUME.selectionScreenP: Select {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} to put in your Hand.
THEHEROEXPANSION-EXHUME.title: Exhume
THEHEROEXPANSION-CONCENTRATE.title: Concentrate
THEHEROEXPANSION-REMEMBER.description: Add Retain to every card in hand{IfUpgraded:show: and Upgrade them.|.}
THEHEROEXPANSION-REMEMBER.title: Remember
THEHEROEXPANSION-RESENT.description:
Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]
Play {Cards:plural:it|them} for free
THEHEROEXPANSION-RESENT.title: Resent
THEHEROEXPANSION-SEEK.description: Put {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-SEEK.selectionScreenPro: Select {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} to put in your Hand.
THEHEROEXPANSION-SEEK.title: Seek
THEHEROEXPANSION-VAKUUS_PRANK.descriptio:
{IfUpgraded:show:[red][shake]More? Alright, Have fun.[/shake][/red]
}At the end of your turn, Take {VakuusPrankPower:diff()} Damage.
THEHEROEXPANSION-VAKUUS_PRANK.title: Vakuus Prank
